title: Desktop Support Technician II
lines: Provide Tier 2 desktop and operational support within a large healthcare environment supporting endpoint systems, access workflows, clinical peripherals, and Epic-connected device operations.
Coordinate escalations across infrastructure, application, and operational teams while maintaining detailed troubleshooting and ticket documentation.
Support Microsoft 365, Citrix VDI, Epic-connected workflows, identity systems, VPN access, and enterprise endpoint operations across multiple departments and locations.
Contribute to workflow standardization, knowledge organization, and AI-governance discussions surrounding enterprise support operations.

title: Technical Support Specialist
lines: Delivered service desk support for distributed healthcare operations across multiple facilities and remote environments.
Supported account access, endpoint troubleshooting, printers, phones, VPN connectivity, and operational incidents within an ITSM-driven support structure.
Documented incidents, escalation details, and troubleshooting workflows while coordinating with internal support teams and healthcare staff.
Developed strong operational troubleshooting habits, escalation discipline, and user-facing technical communication in a high-volume support environment.

title: Technical Support Analyst
lines: Provided queue-based remote technical support for users experiencing authentication, VPN, virtual desktop, and application-access issues.
Troubleshot software, connectivity, and endpoint-related problems while guiding users through structured support workflows.
Built foundational experience in incident handling, remote troubleshooting, technical communication, and support documentation within a fast-paced service environment.
